body:
## Problem
`computeTotal` in `src/cart.js` called `Array.prototype.reduce` without an initial value. On an empty cart this throws `TypeError: Reduce of empty array with no initial value` (and is the root cause of the NaN/total issue reported).

## Fix
Pass an initial accumulator value of `0` to `reduce`, so an empty cart correctly totals `0`.

## Verification
`node test.js` now passes, including the `computeTotal([]) === 0` assertion.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
title: Fix: empty cart total shows NaN/throws
